text.title: Embedding Model Selection for RAG Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: inventory-corpus
step.action: Collect avg/p95 chunk token count, language mix, target queries/sec, $ budget, PII/air-gap constraints.
step.decision-gate: If avg_tokens > model max_input_tokens, re-chunk first.

step.name: shortlist-providers
step.action: Map constraints to providers: air-gapped → local (BGE/E5); multilingual → Cohere multilingual / bge-m3; English production → OpenAI -large.

step.name: benchmark
step.action: Run NDCG@10 + MRR + latency on 500-query eval set; record cost per query.
step.decision-gate: Pick highest NDCG within cost+latency budget.

step.name: record-decision
step.action: Write decision-record per schema; include dimension count and rationale ≥40 chars + ≥2 alternatives.

step.name: validate-and-version
step.action: Run scripts/validate-embedding-model-selection.py; tag the vector DB collection with model_name+dimension; commit decision-record.
